betOfDay.analysis: Hawks -7.5 locked perfectly across all 9 books (FanDuel, DraftKings, BetMGM, BetRivers, Bovada, BetOnline, BetUS, LowVig, MyBookie). Zero line movement = sharp consensus. Hawks dominant at home, Warriors struggling on the road this season.

picks.reasoning: Line locked at -7.5 across all 9 major books — no movement, full sharp consensus. Hawks at home vs struggling Warriors road team. Best line-lock play of the night.
Clippers -7.5 locked across all 9 books as well. Strong road team vs struggling Mavs. Double-locked spread night.
Rockets have been one of the hottest teams in the West. Home court advantage. Heat inconsistent on road. Majority of books at -2.5.

research.nba: 8 NBA games tonight (March 21). Top value plays: Hawks -7.5 (perfect lock), Clippers -7.5 (perfect lock), Rockets -2.5 at home. Avoid: Spurs -16 (too steep), Knicks -19.5 (blowout risk). 76ers @ Jazz line split -5 to -6, not clean enough.
